caption: A person’s hands are shown opening a white box containing a gold-colored rectangular holder. In the top-left frame, the box is open with the gold holder inside. By the top-right frame, the person is lifting the gold holder from the box. In the bottom-left frame, the person holds a sports trading card of Frank Thomas, which features a signature and the text "19/99". The card is held in front of the white box. In the final bottom-right frame, the person is placing the card into the gold holder. Throughout the sequence, a picture-in-picture window shows a man with a beard wearing a black t-shirt sitting in a room with equipment. The logo "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" are displayed on the screen. The background consists of a patterned tabletop and stacks of plastic-sleeved cards.
